{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":411},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7585358923902616344","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"结构清晰，真实客观，很有想向力"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1766107439,"group_id":"7548105218152483864","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwwTUz/3NQcTuroq9Epc3YhPvzfrmIZkqzzUb+aRLClz","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4204956927934206","user_name":"爱吃苹果雪糕的嘤嘤嘤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4204956927934206","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741610600,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7548105218152483864","book_info":{"abstract":"【传统仙侠，非系统，简介无力，请看正文】
被贬废丹房那日，全宗门都笑我是修仙界第一废物。
我瞬间觉醒混沌丹体，丹是废的？我反手炼出太古神丹，丹药当饭吃。
炉是破的？我用它引来九天神火，淬炼不灭金身。
他们不知道，这里还有着上古第一传承。
当昔日仇敌找上门来，掌门和一众太上长老燃烧精血欲同归于尽。
我叹了口气，从废丹房内扔出一颗昨日练手搓的“废丹”。
刹那间，丹化金龙，万里云散，满宗寂静。
昔日弃我，辱我者，尽皆跪伏，颤抖着望向那个他们从未正眼瞧过的破烂丹房。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/384778135b952e1167322c6217a103cb","author":"一朵青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"7548105218152483864","book_name":"被贬废丹房，我偷偷无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7562814435719381566","read_count":"78954","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"712075"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"357","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,奇幻仙侠,无敌,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o62a84dee3b7ee0687957c8819140dad5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383873&x-signature=mnBXkWi3Xroj4t2QPQzrUcLhXjo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103215920912","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"48"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":10562,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21131,"reply_count":0,"show_p 我瞬间觉醒混沌丹体，丹是废的？我反手炼出太古神丹，丹药当饭吃。
炉是破的？我用它引来九天神火，淬炼不灭金身。
他们不知道，这里还有着上古第一传承。
当昔日仇敌找上门来，掌门和一众太上长老燃烧精血欲同归于尽。

被贬废丹房那日，全宗门都笑我是修仙界第一废物。
我瞬间觉醒混沌丹体，丹是废的？我反手炼出太古神丹，丹药当饭吃。
炉是破的？我用它引来九天神火，淬炼不灭金身。
他们不知道，这里还有着上古第一传承。
当昔日仇敌找上门来，掌门和一众太上长老燃烧精血欲同归于尽。
我叹了口气，从废丹房内扔出一颗昨日练手搓的“废丹”。
刹那间，丹化金龙，万里云散，满宗寂静。
昔日弃我，辱我者，尽皆跪伏，颤抖着望向那个他们从未正眼瞧过的破烂丹房。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/384778135b952e1167322c6217a103cb","author":"一朵青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"7548105218152483864","book_name":"被贬废丹房，我偷偷无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7562814435719381566","read_count":"78954","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"712075"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"357","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,奇幻仙侠,无敌,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o62a84dee3b7ee0687957c8819140dad5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383873&x-signature=mnBXkWi3Xroj4t2QPQzrUcLhXjo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103215920912","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读45分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2355,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2689,"reply_count":3,"show_p 被贬废丹房那日，全宗门都笑我是修仙界第一废物。
我瞬间觉醒混沌丹体，丹是废的？我反手炼出太古神丹，丹药当饭吃。
炉是破的？我用它引来九天神火，淬炼不灭金身。
他们不知道，这里还有着上古第一传承。
当昔日仇敌找上门来，掌门和一众太上长老燃烧精血欲同归于尽。
我叹了口气，从废丹房内扔出一颗昨日练手搓的“废丹”。
刹那间，丹化金龙，万里云散，满宗寂静。
昔日弃我，辱我者，尽皆跪伏，颤抖着望向那个他们从未正眼瞧过的破烂丹房。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/384778135b952e1167322c6217a103cb","author":"一朵青莲","author_id":"","book_id":"7548105218152483864","book_name":"被贬废丹房，我偷偷无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7562814435719381566","read_count":"78954","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"712075"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"357","tags":"东方仙侠,玄幻,仙侠,奇幻仙侠,无敌,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o62a84dee3b7ee0687957c8819140dad5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779383873&x-signature=mnBXkWi3Xroj4t2QPQzrUcLhXjo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103215920912","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"21"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3975,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":70
